## TC-01 — Successful login with valid credentials

**Priority**: P0
**Category**: FUNCTIONAL
**Standards**: OWASP ASVS 2.1.1, NIST SP 800-63B 5.1

**Given** a registered user with a valid email and password
**When** they enter their credentials and click "Sign in"
**Then** they are authenticated and redirected to the home page

> [VERIFY] Confirm redirect destination.

## TC-02 — Login rejected with wrong password

**Priority**: P1
**Category**: FUNCTIONAL
**Standards**: OWASP ASVS 2.2.1

**Given** a registered user
**When** they enter an incorrect password
**Then** an error is shown and the user stays on the login page

> [VERIFY] Confirm error message does not enumerate accounts.

## TC-03 — Empty form shows validation errors

**Priority**: P1
**Category**: FUNCTIONAL
**Standards**: WCAG 2.2 SC 3.3.1

**Given** an empty login form
**When** the user clicks "Sign in"
**Then** inline errors appear for both email and password

> [VERIFY] Confirm aria-describedby linkage.

## TC-04 — Invalid email format rejected

**Priority**: P1
**Category**: FUNCTIONAL
**Standards**: WCAG 2.2 SC 3.3.1

**Given** user enters "notanemail"
**When** they submit
**Then** an inline email format error is shown

> [VERIFY] Confirm validation fires before network request.

## TC-05 — Keyboard navigation works

**Priority**: P1
**Category**: ACCESSIBILITY
**Standards**: WCAG 2.2 SC 2.1.1

**Given** the page is loaded
**When** the user tabs through the form
**Then** focus moves in order through all interactive elements

> [VERIFY] Confirm visible focus indicators.

## TC-06 — Forgot password link navigates

**Priority**: P1
**Category**: FUNCTIONAL

**Given** user is on login page
**When** they click "Forgot your password?"
**Then** they navigate to the password reset page

> [VERIFY] Confirm target URL.

## TC-07 — Create account link works

**Priority**: P1
**Category**: FUNCTIONAL

**Given** user is on login page
**When** they click "Create an account"
**Then** they navigate to the registration page

> [VERIFY] Confirm target URL.

## TC-08 — XSS attempt sanitized

**Priority**: P1
**Category**: SECURITY
**Standards**: OWASP ASVS 5.3.3

**Given** login form is open
**When** user enters a script tag in the email field and submits
**Then** the script is not executed

> [VERIFY] Confirm server-side encoding.

## TC-GX-01 — Page load within SLA

**Priority**: P0
**Category**: PERFORMANCE
**Standards**: WCAG 2.2 SC 2.2.1

**Given** a broadband connection
**When** user navigates to the login page
**Then** LCP is within 2.5 seconds

> [VERIFY] Confirm SLA matches product spec.
